title: angianthus micropodioides
intro: Angianthus micropodioides, also known as the Dwarf Mulla Mulla, is a type of flowering plant native to Western Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Angianthus micropodioides include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Angianthus micropodioides typically involve infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil to create a topical salve or tincture.
